title: leucanthemum cacuminis
intro: Leucanthemum cacuminis, also known as the Alpine Daisy, is a flowering plant species native to the mountainous regions of China. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Leucanthemum cacuminis include reducing inflammation, improving immune function, and potentially alleviating symptoms of digestive disorders. Leucanthemum cacuminis is often prepared into teas, infusions, and tinctures for medicinal use, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and optimal dosage.
